mapper.select: SELECT r.*, d.name AS doctor_name, d.title AS doctor_title, h.name AS hospital_name, p.name AS patient_name, i.title AS fee_title FROM tb_appointment_record r LEFT JOIN tb_doctor d ON r.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tb_hospital h ON r.hospital_id = h.id LEFT JOIN tb_patient_profile p ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_appointment_item i ON r.fee_id = i.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, d.name AS doctor_name, d.title AS doctor_title, h.name AS hospital_name, p.name AS patient_name, i.title AS fee_title FROM tb_appointment_record r LEFT JOIN tb_doctor d ON r.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tb_hospital h ON r.hospital_id = h.id LEFT JOIN tb_patient_profile p ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_appointment_item i ON r.fee_id = i.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_appointment_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
